record.field: Roasted Squid with Corn & Asparagus (Sichuan Peppercorn Vinaigrette) 燒魷魚黃金粟米蘆筍沙律 (伴巴蜀花椒油醋汁)
Cold Seafood Platter (Prawn, Mussels & Sea Whelk) 意式凍海鮮沙律(大蝦、青口及海螺)
Tamagoyaki with Caviar 黑魚籽玉子金磚
Mini Vegan Beef Burger (V) 迷你未來牛肉漢堡 (素)
Thick-cut Pork Chop with White Curry 南洋白咖喱厚切吉列豬扒
Teriyaki Chicken with Sesame & Spring Onion 東瀛板燒芝麻蔥花雞扒
Red Wine Braised Beef Ribs with Roasted Potatoes 紅酒燴牛肋條配燒薯
Barramundi Fillet with Tomato & Garlic 蒜香蕃茄盲曹魚柳
Linguine Alle Vongole 爆香意式蒜片大蜆扁意粉
Spaghetti alla Bolognese 經典肉醬意粉
Spaghetti with Italian Vegan Meatball & Cherry Tomato Sauce (V) 意式素肉丸車厘茄意粉 (素)
One-bite Lemon Tarts 一口法式檸檬撻
Corporate Western Buffet 西式自助餐
Buffet Package Fee (per person) 自助餐套餐費 (每位)
Deluxe Drink Package Upgrade (per person) 優越級飲品升級 (每位)
Corkage Fee (per person) 開瓶費 (每位)
Corporate Western Buffet 西式自助餐

Per-head buffet for 50+ persons (minimum order 50 pax). HK$398/person base. Pick the "Buffet Package Fee" line first, then choose: A. 2 Salad/Appetizer, B. 3 Party Snacks, C. 3 Main Courses, D. 1 Vegetable, E. 2 Pasta/Risotto, F. 3 Desserts. Items marked with surcharge add to the base price per person. Standard drinks included. Upgrade to Deluxe (+$60/person) for wine & beer. Includes delivery, 3 waiters (4hrs), tablecloth, chafing dishes, tableware. 7 working days advance order required.
B. Party Snack — Choose 3 (40 pcs/cups each)
0.25 L/pax rounded up. Kitchen +0.5 L. Bowls = pax (invoice description only).
0.6 pcs per pax (e.g. 30 pcs for 50 pax). Kitchen qty = invoice qty.
